proof: function(x0: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]) { subspace_inclusion[T](a, x0) = f(x0) }(p)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0]) { lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0].value(x1) = subspace_inclusion[T0](x0, x1) }[T](a, p)

goal: T.is_open(v) and forall(x0: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]) { pre.contains(x0) = v.contains(lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, x0].value) }
proof: let w0: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a] satisfy { lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a].value(w0) ∈ v != w0 ∈ pre }
function(x0: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]) { lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a].value(x0) ∈ v = x0 ∈ pre }(w0)

function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x1]]) { (T0.is_open(x0) and forall(x3: lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x1]) { lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x1].value(x3) ∈ x0 = x3 ∈ x2 }) = has_subspace_witness[T0](x1, x2, x0) }[T](v, a, pre)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0]]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { has_subspace_witness[T0](x0, x1, k0) } = subspace_open[T0](x0, x1) }[T](a, pre)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) } }[Set[T]](has_subspace_witness[T](a, pre), v)

function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0]]) { TopologicalSpace.is_open[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0]](x1) = subspace_open[T0](x0, x1) }[T](a, pre)

goal: is_continuous[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a], T](f) = forall(x0: Set[T]) { T.is_open(x0) implies TopologicalSpace.is_open(set_preimage[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a], T](f, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[T, lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]](f)
function(x0: Set[T]) { not T.is_open(x0) or TopologicalSpace.is_open[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]](set_preimage[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a], T](f, x0)) }(v)
let w0: Set[T] satisfy { T.is_open(w0) and not TopologicalSpace.is_open[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]](set_preimage[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a], T](f, w0)) }
function(x0: Set[T]) { not T.is_open(x0) or TopologicalSpace.is_open[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a]](set_preimage[lib(topological_space).Subspace[T, a], T](f, x0)) }(w0)
